text: Managing deadlines is a crucial skill for work and study. Effective time management starts with breaking large projects into smaller tasks and setting realistic daily goals. Prioritization helps you focus on what is most important or urgent first, ensuring critical work gets done. Scope management means clearly understanding what a task includes and avoiding adding extra work without permission. Finally, communication is key: if you foresee a delay, inform your team or manager early to adjust expectations or request help. By combining these strategies, you can meet deadlines with less stress and better results.
